secmp.description: Android security testing proxy with ADB certificate injection and traffic capture
secmp.config.runtimePath: Optional local SecMP runtime directory. Point this to the extracted runtime directory, or to a parent directory containing runtime/. This takes precedence over archive and URL settings.
secmp.config.runtimeArchivePath: Optional local SecMP runtime zip path. The extension extracts this archive into global storage when the runtime is missing or invalid. This takes precedence over runtimeUrl.
secmp.config.runtimeUrl: Optional URL for the SecMP runtime zip. Leave empty to use the runtime from the matching GitHub Release.
secmp.config.runtimeSha256: Optional SHA-256 checksum for the SecMP runtime zip. Leave empty to use the built-in checksum for the default GitHub Release runtime when available.
secmp.config.runtimeVersion: Expected SecMP runtime version. Changing this value forces the extension to install that runtime version.
secmp.config.language: Display language for SecMP runtime messages and Webview UI. Command Palette titles and Settings descriptions follow the VS Code display language.
secmp.config.fontSize: Base font size for the SecMP Webview, in px. 13 is the default, and 12 is close to the previous size.
secmp.config.fontSize.compact: Compact, close to the previous size
secmp.config.openPanelAfterNewSession: Automatically open the capture panel after creating a temporary or persistent SecMP session.
secmp.config.ipLocation.enabled: Show an IP location column in the capture list and query locations for public server IP addresses.
secmp.config.ipLocation.endpoint.markdow: HTTP POST endpoint for IP location lookup. Leave empty to disable requests. After setting it, click [Test endpoint](command:secmp.testIpLocationEndpoint) or run `SecMP: Test IP Location Endpoint` from the Command Palette.
secmp.config.windowsRuntimePath: Deprecated compatibility setting. Use secmp.runtimePath instead.
secmp.config.windowsRuntimeArchivePath: Deprecated compatibility setting. Use secmp.runtimeArchivePath instead.
secmp.config.windowsRuntimeUrl: Deprecated compatibility setting. Use secmp.runtimeUrl instead.
secmp.config.windowsRuntimeSha256: Deprecated compatibility setting. Use secmp.runtimeSha256 instead.
secmp.config.windowsRuntimeVersion: Deprecated compatibility setting. Use secmp.runtimeVersion instead.
secmp.config.updateCheckEnabled: Automatically check the SecMP GitHub Release for a newer VSIX package.
secmp.config.updateCheckIntervalHours: Minimum interval, in hours, between automatic SecMP update checks.
secmp.viewsContainer.title: SecMP
secmp.view.sidebar.name: Sessions
